<!-- Code generated from the comments of the DiskForExportConfig struct in post-processor/mws-export/config.go; DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY -->

- `disk_for_export_type` (string) - Type of disk for export to create (defaults to "nbs-pl2").

- `additional_disk_for_export_size` (string) - Additional size of the disk for export image (defaults to "0 GB").
  Adds to image_for_export minDiskSize.

- `disk_for_export_iops` (int64) - IOPS for the disk for export image (defaults to 1000).

- `project_for_export` (string) - Project ID where the image_for_export exists (defaults to the `project`).

- `image_for_export` (string) - ID of an existing image to export (required when post processor used without mws builder).

<!-- End of code generated from the comments of the DiskForExportConfig struct in post-processor/mws-export/config.go; -->
